{{documentation}}
This template displays an infobox for [[resource nodes]].

==Usage==
This template can be used by entering the following on a relevant resource node page.

<pre>{{Infobox Resource Node
|name = 
|image = 
|imagesize = 
|location = 
|respawn =
}}</pre>

==Parameters==
===name===
The name of the resource node.

===image===
An image of the resource node.

===imagesize===
An optional size for the image of the resource node.

===location===
Where the resource node can be found.

===respawn===
The respawn time (formatted with in-game days).

{{TemplateData|
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"name": {
			"label": "Name",
			"type": "string",
            "description": "The name of the scenery.",
			"required": true
		},
		"image": {
			"label": "Image",
            "description": "An image of the scenery.",
			"type": "wiki-file-name",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"imagesize": {
            "label": "Image size",
            "description": "An optional size for the image for the scenery.",
            "default": "300",
            "type": "number"
        },
		"location": {
			"type": "line",
            "label": "Location",
            "description": "Where the scenery can be found.",
			"suggested": true
		},
        "respawn": {
			"type": "line",
            "label": "respawn",
            "description": "Where the scenery can be found.",
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "Infobox describing a resource node.",
	"paramOrder": [
		"name",
		"image",
		"imagesize",
		"location",
        "respawn"
	],
	"format": "block"
}
</templatedata>
}}

<includeonly>[[Category:Infobox templates|Resource nodes]]</includeonly>
